entries.title: Default theme settings screen.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/foundation-theme in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: A site owner adjusts Foundation Theme settings and reviews theme defaults.

entries.title: Frontend page using the default theme.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/foundation-theme in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: A visitor sees a seeded page rendered by Foundation Theme with its header, footer, tokens, and components.

entries.title: Generated Tailwind asset output review.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/foundation-theme in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: A developer verifies the generated Tailwind entrypoint after package/theme asset registration.

entries.title: Foundation header Layout Builder area.
entries.notes: Capture a public page with a seeded header-area block to prove Foundation Theme renders the registered Layout Builder header area.
entries.useCase: A maintainer verifies the registered Layout Builder header area renders through Foundation Theme.
